aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and a user-friendly website structure. However, there is room for improvement in local SEO and content depth.
quick_wins: Add more detailed service pages with location-specific keywords.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews found.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP or any reviews significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews to build social proof.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are consistent on the website but need to be verified across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Claim and verify the business on Google, Bing, and Yelp.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and local listings.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of local SEO optimization and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local plumbing, HVAC, or electrical services in Naperville.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing the website for local search terms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by creating content that addresses common customer questions and concerns.

page_title: Expert Plumbing — Veteran‑Built Naperville Plumbing, HVAC & Electrical
